name: solar-house-card
description: Home Assistant Lovelace card: isometric house with solar monitoring and weather-based image variants

scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8').replace('./src/solar-house-card.ts','./solar-house-card.js'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h); if(fs.existsSync('home.png')) fs.copyFileSync('home.png', path.join('dist','home.png'));"
